title: Spandau celebrates 75th anniversary
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - Spandau Secondary School celebrated its 75th year of existence last week.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - Spandau Secondary School celebrated its 75th year of existence last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The celebrations started on Friday, 14 February, at the school, where the former principal, Mr. Mike Lepotha, handed over the flaming torch to the current headmaster, Mr. Eugene Mackelina."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The program, celebrated by the learners of the school and invited dignitaries, marked the beginning of the festivities.","html":"The program, celebrated by the learners of the school and invited dignitaries, marked the beginning of the festivities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO:  Neco Bokwe","html":"VIDEO: Neco Bokwe"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
